baseline.bucket_note: Baseline uses coarse FFN timer buckets from layer::forward_timed; W13/W2/gate/merge are not separately exposed.

shard2.bucket_note: Shard buckets are recorded as max per-shard phase time; FFN-only wall time is end-to-end outer shard section wall.

shard4.bucket_note: Shard buckets are recorded as max per-shard phase time; FFN-only wall time is end-to-end outer shard section wall.

shard8.bucket_note: Shard buckets are recorded as max per-shard phase time; FFN-only wall time is end-to-end outer shard section wall.
